description: backend: fix cli_tests port-detection to compile and pass on Windows
context: backend/tests/cli_tests.rs uses lsof/ss unconditionally; both are absent on Windows, causing NotFound panic in rust-windows CI. Replace the port-detection block with cfg-gated branches: #[cfg(unix)] keeps lsof+ss chain; #[cfg(windows)] uses netstat -ano filtered by child.id() PID to extract the listening port. No logic changes outside port-detection. cargo test -p anvilml --features mock-hardware --test cli_tests exits 0 on Windows.

description: anvilml-core: add #[serial] to env-var-mutating config_load tests
context: config_load_tests.rs has three tests that call std::env::set_var (test_env_var_beats_toml, test_cli_override_beats_env, test_nested_env_var). Cargo runs tests concurrently; capture-and-restore alone does not prevent concurrent threads observing mutated env vars mid-flight. Add serial_test as dev-dep to anvilml-core Cargo.toml. Annotate all three tests with #[serial]. Update docs/TESTS.md entries for those three tests. cargo test -p anvilml-core --test config_load_tests exits 0 under 50 parallel runs: for i in $(seq 1 50); do cargo test -p anvilml-core --test config_load_tests || exit 1; done
